final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Chinese ink wash landscape painting embodying Eastern aesthetics.

Style/medium: traditional Chinese ink wash painting (shuǐmò huà), xieyi freehand brushwork style, Song Dynasty literati tradition
Composition: layered depth with distant mountains, middle mist, and foreground elements, balanced negative space following the rule of thirds
Subject: elderly scholar in loose robes fishing by a mountain stream, pine trees with gnarled trunks, thatched cottage with simple architecture
Scene/backdrop: distant mountains in soft indigo gradient, swirling mist between peaks, stream flowing through rocks, vast empty sky
Lighting/mood: diffused natural light, ethereal atmosphere, contemplative solitude, spiritual tranquility
Color palette: monochromatic ink tones from wet black to dry gray, subtle indigo wash for distant mountains, warm sepia accents on cottage and figure
Materials/textures: visible brushstrokes with wet-on-wet ink bleeding, dry brush texture for pine bark, soft gradients for mist, rice paper absorbency
Constraints: generous negative space essential; must evoke "意境" (artistic conception); no Western perspective, maintain flat Chinese spatial logic
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; Western oil painting techniques; oversaturated colors; cluttered composition; modern elements; 8K stuffer language
